utility_evaluation.REASONING: The format lists 7 required items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Now checking the final package: destination is given (Lisbon, Portugal); travel_dates are specified (2024-10-05 to 2024-10-09); transportation includes flight details and cost (Budget Airlines, Economy, €110); accommodation includes hotel name, type, rating, and cost (€450); activities include two items, each with a name and cost (€35 and €40); additional_services is included but marked as 'None (assumed)'; total_budget is included (€895). All required items appear and are reasonably detailed. The only slight issue is that 'additional_services' is only noted as 'None', but that still counts as included since the user did not request extras. Therefore, all 7/7 items are covered and sufficiently specified.
